---
title: "Combined_cor/vi_plot"
output: html_document
date: "2025-11-21"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(readxl)
corr_manual <- read_excel("~/corr_manual.xlsx")
vi_all <- read_excel("~/vi_all.xlsx")
```

```{r}
# First table: variable importance
# vi_all: Site, Metric ("max","mean","range"), Model, Variable, Importance

vi_all2 <- vi_all %>%
  mutate(
    Metric_long = case_when(
      Metric == "max"   ~ "Max WT",
      Metric == "mean"  ~ "Mean WT",
      Metric == "range" ~ "Range WT",
      TRUE ~ Metric
    )
  )

# Second table: correlations
# corr_manual: Site, Metric ("Max WT","Mean WT","Range WT"), Variable, rho

combined_tbl <- vi_all2 %>%
  inner_join(
    corr_manual,
    by = c("Site", "Metric_long" = "Metric", "Variable")
  ) %>%
  select(Site, Metric = Metric_long, Model, Variable, Importance, rho)

write_csv(
  combined_tbl,file = "varimp_with_rho_combined.csv")

```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(stringr)

library(dplyr)
library(stringr)

## ---- helper functions (put these BEFORE the pipeline) -----------------

extract_var <- function(v) {
  v <- tolower(v)
  v <- gsub("_m2_3d|_m2|_3d|_7day|_7d|_3day|_3d|_2day|_2d|_daily|min|max|mean|range",
            "", v)
  v <- gsub("^_", "", v)
  v
}

extract_metric <- function(v) {
  v <- tolower(v)
  base <- extract_var(v)
  case_when(
    grepl("min",  v) ~ paste0(base, "_min"),
    grepl("max",  v) ~ paste0(base, "_max"),
    grepl("mean", v) ~ paste0(base, "_mean"),
    grepl("range",v) ~ paste0(base, "_range"),
    TRUE             ~ base
  )
}

extract_lag <- function(v) {
  v <- tolower(v)
  case_when(
    grepl("7day|7d", v) ~ "7day",
    grepl("3day|3d", v) ~ "3day",
    grepl("2day|2d", v) ~ "2day",
    grepl("daily",    v) ~ "daily",
    TRUE                 ~ "none"
  )
}

## ---- main plot_data object -------------------------------------------

plot_data <- combined_tbl %>%
  mutate(
    # clean up model labels and factor order
    Model_clean = case_when(
      Model %in% c("GLS", "lme", "LME") ~ "LM",
      Model %in% c("RFR", "rfr")       ~ "RFR",
      Model %in% c("XGB", "xgb")       ~ "XGB",
      TRUE                             ~ Model
    ),
    Site = factor(
      Site,
      levels = c("Global", "Anvil", "Butte", "Cooper",
                 "Crater", "Hideaway", "Pint", "Sam")
    ),
    Model_clean = factor(Model_clean, levels = c("LM", "RFR", "XGB"))
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Lag_raw = extract_lag(Variable),
    VarRow  = extract_metric(Variable)
  ) %>%
  group_by(Metric, Site, Model_clean) %>%
  mutate(
    Importance_scaled = {
      mn <- min(Importance, na.rm = TRUE)
      mx <- max(Importance, na.rm = TRUE)
      if (mx > mn) (Importance - mn) / (mx - mn) else 0
    }
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    VarGroup_raw = case_when(
      grepl("^size",  VarRow)       ~ "Size_km2",
      grepl("^elev",  VarRow)       ~ "Elev_m",
      grepl("^ppt",   VarRow)       ~ "ppt",
      grepl("^air_",  VarRow)       ~ "Air",
      grepl("^solar", VarRow)       ~ "Solar",
      grepl("^water_area", VarRow)  ~ "OWA",
      grepl("^gwt_",  VarRow)       ~ "GWT",
      grepl("^gwl_",  VarRow)       ~ "GWL",
      grepl("^wl_",   VarRow)       ~ "WL",
      TRUE                          ~ NA_character_
    ),
    VarGroup = case_when(
      VarGroup_raw %in% c("Size_km2", "Elev_m")          ~ "Static",
      VarGroup_raw %in% c("ppt", "Air", "Solar")        ~ "Atmospheric",
      VarGroup_raw %in% c("OWA", "GWT", "GWL", "WL")     ~ "Hydrologic",
      TRUE                                              ~ NA_character_
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(VarGroup)) %>%
  mutate(
    Lag = factor(
      dplyr::recode(
        Lag_raw,
        "none"  = "No lag / static",
        "daily" = "Daily",
        "2day"  = "2-day",
        "3day"  = "3-day",
        "7day"  = "7-day"
      ),
      levels = c("No lag / static", "Daily", "2-day", "3-day", "7-day")
    ),
    VarGroup = factor(VarGroup, levels = c("Static", "Atmospheric", "Hydrologic")),

    # build display labels for y-axis (do NOT tolower() the final output)
    VarRow_label = {
      v <- tolower(VarRow)

      # exact replacements
      v[v == "size_km2"] <- "Size"
      v[v == "elev_m"]   <- "Elev"

      # prefix replacements (keep the suffix like _range/_mean/_max/_min)
      v <- str_replace(v, "^air_t_", "AT ")
      v <- str_replace(v, "^wl_",    "WL ")
      v <- str_replace(v, "^gwt_",   "GWT ")
      v <- str_replace(v, "^gwl_",   "GWL ")
      v <- str_replace(v, "^water_area_", "Open water ")
      v <- str_replace(v, "^water_area$",  "Open water")
      v <- str_replace(v, "^solar_", "Solar ")

      # make suffix readable
      v <- str_replace_all(v, "_", " ")

      v
    }
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    VarRow_plot = factor(
      VarRow,
      levels = rev(sort(unique(VarRow))),
      labels = VarRow_label[match(rev(sort(unique(VarRow))), VarRow)]
    )
  )

```

```{r}
library(ggtext)

plot_metric_bubbles <- function(metric_label) {

  df <- plot_data %>%
    filter(Metric == metric_label) %>%
    mutate(
      # merge No-lag + Daily into a single category
      Lag = case_when(
        Lag %in% c("No lag / static", "Daily") ~ "No lag / daily",
        TRUE ~ as.character(Lag)
      ),
      Lag = factor(Lag, levels = c("No lag / daily", "2-day", "3-day", "7-day")),

      # adjust size if you want (optional)
      Importance_adj = case_when(
        Lag %in% c("2-day", "3-day", "7-day") ~ Importance_scaled * 0.82,
        TRUE ~ Importance_scaled
      ),

      # bold the Global label
      Site_label = ifelse(Site == "Global",
                          "<b>Global</b>",
                          as.character(Site)),
      Site_label = factor(Site_label, levels = unique(Site_label))
    )

  ggplot(df, aes(x = Site_label, y = VarRow)) +
    geom_point(
      aes(
        size  = Importance_adj,
        color = rho,
        fill  = rho,
        shape = Lag
      ),
      alpha  = 0.9,
      stroke = 0.3
    ) +

    # Color scale
    scale_color_gradient2(
      low  = "#2166ac",
      mid  = "white",
      high = "#b2182b",
      midpoint = 0,
      limits   = c(-1, 1),
      oob      = scales::squish,
      name     = "Spearman correlation"
    ) +

    scale_fill_gradient2(
      low  = "#2166ac",
      mid  = "white",
      high = "#b2182b",
      midpoint = 0,
      limits   = c(-1, 1),
      oob      = scales::squish,
      guide    = "none"
    ) +

    scale_size_area(
      max_size = 7,
      limits   = c(0, 1),
      breaks   = c(0, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 1),
      name     = "Relative importance (0–1)"
    ) +

scale_shape_manual(
  values = c(
    "No lag / daily" = 16,  # circle
    "2-day"          = 15,  # square
    "3-day"          = 24,  # triangle
    "7-day"          = 25   # triangle down
  ),
  name = "Lag"
) +

    guides(
      size  = guide_legend(order = 1),
      shape = guide_legend(
        override.aes = list(size = 4, fill = "black"),
        order = 2
      )
    ) +

    facet_grid(
      VarGroup ~ Model_clean,
      scales = "free_y",
      space  = "free_y",
      switch = "y"
    ) +

    scale_y_discrete(limits = rev) +
    labs(
      x = "Site",
      y = NULL,
      title = metric_label
    ) +

    theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    theme(
      # guide lines
      panel.grid.major.x = element_line(color = "grey90", linewidth = 0.3),
      panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "grey90", linewidth = 0.3),
      panel.grid.minor   = element_blank(),

      # white backgrounds
      panel.background  = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
      plot.background   = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
      legend.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
      strip.background  = element_rect(fill = "grey90", color = NA),

      # bold Global with markdown
      axis.text.x = element_markdown(angle = 45, hjust = 1),

      strip.text.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
      strip.text.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11),

      legend.position = "right",
      strip.placement = "outside",

      # add spacing between LME/GLS, RFR, XGB columns
      panel.spacing.x = unit(1.2, "lines")
    )
}

```


```{r}
p_max   <- plot_metric_bubbles("Max WT")
p_mean  <- plot_metric_bubbles("Mean WT")
p_range <- plot_metric_bubbles("Range WT")

p_max
p_mean
p_range

ggsave("MaxWT_bubbles.png", p_max, width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300, bg = "white")
ggsave("MeanWT_bubbles.png", p_mean, width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300, bg = "white")
ggsave("RangeWT_bubbles.png", p_range, width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300, bg = "white")

```
```{r}
plot_metric_bubbles_nolagshapes <- function(metric_label) {

  df <- plot_data %>%
    filter(Metric == metric_label) %>%
    mutate(Importance_use = Importance_scaled)

  ggplot(df, aes(x = Site, y = VarRow_plot)) +
    geom_point(
      aes(
        size  = Importance_use,
        color = rho,
        fill  = rho
      ),
      shape  = 21,
      alpha  = 0.9,
      stroke = 0.3
    ) +
    scale_x_discrete(
      limits = levels(plot_data$Site),
      labels = function(x) {
        lab <- ifelse(x == "Global", "bold(Global)", x)
        parse(text = lab)
      }
    ) +
    scale_color_gradient2(
      low  = "#2166ac",
      mid  = "white",
      high = "#b2182b",
      midpoint = 0,
      limits   = c(-1, 1),
      oob      = scales::squish,
      name     = "Spearman correlation"
    ) +
    scale_fill_gradient2(
      low  = "#2166ac",
      mid  = "white",
      high = "#b2182b",
      midpoint = 0,
      limits   = c(-1, 1),
      oob      = scales::squish,
      guide    = "none"
    ) +
    scale_size_area(
      max_size = 7,
      limits   = c(0, 1),
      breaks   = c(0, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 1),
      name     = "Relative importance (0–1)"
    ) +
    guides(
      size = guide_legend(
        override.aes = list(shape = 21, fill = "black", color = "black", alpha = 1)
      )
    ) +
    facet_grid(
      VarGroup ~ Model_clean,
      scales = "free_y",
      space  = "free_y",
      switch = "y"
    ) +
    scale_y_discrete(limits = rev) +
    labs(
      x = "Site",
      y = NULL,
      title = metric_label
    ) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    theme(
      panel.grid.major.x = element_line(color = "grey90", linewidth = 0.3),
      panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "grey90", linewidth = 0.3),
      panel.grid.minor   = element_blank(),

      panel.background  = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
      plot.background   = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
      legend.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
      strip.background  = element_rect(fill = "grey90", color = NA),

      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),

      strip.text.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
      strip.text.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11),

      legend.position = "right",
      strip.placement = "outside",
      panel.spacing.x = unit(1.2, "lines")
    )
}

```

```{r}
p_max_nolag   <- plot_metric_bubbles_nolagshapes("Max WT")
p_mean_nolag  <- plot_metric_bubbles_nolagshapes("Mean WT")
p_range_nolag <- plot_metric_bubbles_nolagshapes("Range WT")

p_max_nolag
p_mean_nolag
p_range_nolag

ggsave("MaxWT_bubbles_nolag.png",   p_max_nolag,   width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300, bg = "white")
ggsave("MeanWT_bubbles_nolag.png",  p_mean_nolag,  width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300, bg = "white")
ggsave("RangeWT_bubbles_nolag.png", p_range_nolag, width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300, bg = "white")

```
